title: Court Order Delaying ACTS Deadline Applies Only to Public Institutions in 17 States
summary_en: In a mixed result, a Massachusetts federal district court judge again pushed back the deadline for some institutions to meet the Department of Education’s IPEDS Admissions and Consumer Transparency Supplement (ACTS) reporting requirements.
title_cn: 推迟美国大学入学考试（ACTS）截止日期的法院令仅适用于17个州公立院校
